test_runs.result: 43 shots over 9 sections; first shot 0.0s, last shot 238.9s; coverage 1.0

test_runs.expected: validation report with shot count + section deltas
test_runs.result: emitted 43 vs gold 38; section_count 9 vs 9; section-boundary deltas all 0.0s (perfect alignment)

verbatim_provenance.principle: P3 + R20 — every brand-token / character-marker / scene-marker / section-table string copied verbatim from on-disk authoritative source.
verbatim_provenance.no_invention_assertion: kontext_prompt_template uses the verbatim character_markers + scene_markers + style_anchor and a literal {action} placeholder. The downstream creative content (action description) is explicitly marked in needs_fill[] for operator/LLM completion in a separate phase. The agent does not generate any prompt body text.

validation_summary.section_boundary_alignment: perfect (max delta 0.000s) because the agent reads the same section table the gold was authored against
validation_summary.shot_count_delta_root_cause: the agent uses equal-width slices at target_shot_seconds=5.5 per section; the hand-authored gold groups by lyric phrasing instead. This is a recorded deterministic-vs-artisanal tradeoff, not a defect; recommended downstream behaviour is to use the emitted skeleton as a starting point and let operator/LLM adjust shot boundaries per lyric phrasing.
validation_summary.lyric_attribution: each emitted shot has 0+ lyric lines whose Whisper start falls inside [shot.start, shot.end). Lines straddling a section boundary (e.g. the first verse-1 line at Whisper-start 11.46 vs section.start 11.5) attach to the prior section; this is the deterministic policy.

doctrine_conformance.P3_no_invention: PASS — kontext_prompt_template stays a literal concat of marker+placeholder+marker+placeholder+marker; needs_fill explicitly enumerates the un-filled fields.
doctrine_conformance.R20_preserve_detail: PASS — lyric.text copied verbatim from lyrics_timestamped.json; markers copied verbatim; section table copied verbatim.
doctrine_conformance.O2_O6_O9: PASS — schema_version present; ISO8601 UTC built_at on all outputs; per-run audit JSONs at apex/audit/anim-13/.
